---
title: ""
---

## Welcome to the website for the Preparing to Teach Statistics and Data Science Workshop!

**Preparing to Teach is back!** After a year spent searching for funding, we 
have joined forces with 
[Beth Chance, Nathan Tintle, Alan Rossman, and Karen McGaughey]() and will be
once again offering a 1-day, in-person workshop on Saturday, August 1, 2026
(immediately before JSM 2026).

The goal of this workshop is to prepare graduate students for a role as faculty responsible for teaching statistics and data science to undergraduate students across a variety of disciplines.

![Image of downtown Boston by [penguinandpia](https://www.penguinandpia.com/en/things-to-do-in-boston/)](images/boston.jpeg){fig-alt="An image of downtown Boston with the juxtaposition of tall skyscrapers and the classic red brick buildings. The image also captures the greenery of downtown with some trees surrounding the neighborhood."}
